---
title: "1 · Input data"
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
**Scope.** Everything that goes *into* the twin: high-resolution static layers (the prior),
assimilated ground sensors, and satellite/gridded products. Their native scales, roles, raw-sensor
issues, and the assimilation principle (only ground sensors and satellites are assimilated).
:::

*Content migrating from the report's "Data Grounds" (input side), "Demonstration Data", and the data
provenance / assimilation-principle tables.*

## Static high-resolution layers (the prior)

## Ground sensors — dense in time, sparse in space

## Satellite / gridded products — dense in space, sparse in time

## The assimilation principle and provenance
